name: pattern-surgeon
description: Reactive design-pattern skill for Claude Code. Recommends, applies, and auto-reverts Strategy, Factory, Adapter, Repository, Observer, and Dependency Injection across TypeScript, JavaScript, Python, Java, C#, PHP, Kotlin, Dart, and Swift. Five modes: suggest, refactor, compare, follow, greenfield. Uses only Bash and Read tools. No network access. No repo scanning. Reads only the file you name. Code-mutating modes use a git checkpoint → verify → rollback safety contract.
